sentences.en: We need to analyze the microscope in this scientific context.

sentences.en: The scientist studied the microscope during the laboratory experiment.

sentences.blanked: The scientist studied the ________ during the laboratory experiment.

sentences.en: Recent research provides new data about the microscope of this species.

sentences.blanked: Recent research provides new data about the ________ of this species.

sentences.en: They decided to focus on this microscope for sustainable development.

sentences.blanked: They decided to focus on this ________ for sustainable development.
